settings.title: Settings
settings.saveError: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
settings.terminalScrollbackHelper: 1000-500000; aligned with buffer usage metrics in performance monitoring
settings.logCleanupIntervalHelper: Clean up log entries older than specified days, dual cleanup by size and time
settings.hardwareAccelerationDescription: When on, rendering uses the integrated or discrete GPU, the window is locked to 60Hz, and high-frequency UI updates (e.g. transfer progress) are coalesced per frame. When off, the app falls back to software rendering and WebGL is disabled — lower power use, lower visual smoothness. Requires restart.
settings.imageDescription: Support for Sixel and iTerm image protocols in terminal
settings.cacheDescription: L1/L2 cache improves file list loading speed by 40-60%
settings.prefetchDescription: Intelligently preload data based on access patterns to reduce waiting time
settings.restartMessage: Some performance settings require application restart to take effect. Please restart after saving.

externalEditor.title: External Editor
externalEditor.commandHelper: Provide the executable path or command. %FILE% will be replaced with the downloaded file path. Leave empty to open with the system default application.

security.title: Credential Encryption
security.description: When enabled, SSH passwords and AI API keys are encrypted with the random key plus the master password. When disabled, only the random key is used.
security.createHint: You must set a master password when enabling this option for the first time.
security.changeHint: Leave blank to keep the current master password. Fill both fields to replace it immediately.
security.disableHint: Master password is currently disabled. Sensitive fields are encrypted with the random key only.
security.passwordRequired: Please set a master password first
security.passwordMismatch: The two master password entries do not match
security.updateFailed: Failed to update master password settings

feedback.title: Error Reporting & Feedback
feedback.description: Error reporting is off by default. When enabled, SimpleShell only stores crash markers and diagnostic summaries locally; a diagnostic summary is prefilled in GitHub Issue only after you confirm feedback.
feedback.enableHelper: Allow SimpleShell to collect local crash markers and prepare diagnostic summaries for feedback.
feedback.includeDiagnosticsHelper: Includes version, platform, GPU, update status, sidecar version, recent error logs, and crash record summaries.
feedback.confirmDetail: A diagnostic summary will be prefilled in the issue body. Review it in the browser and remove anything you do not want to publish before submitting.
feedback.saveFailed: Failed to save error reporting settings

masterPassword.title: Enter Master Password
masterPassword.description: Master password protection is enabled. Unlock the app before using the interface.
masterPassword.loadingDescription: Determining whether a master password is required. Please wait.
masterPassword.invalidPassword: Incorrect master password. Please try again.
masterPassword.unlockFailed: Failed to unlock. Please try again.

firstRun.title: First Launch Setup
firstRun.subtitle: Set the basics before entering the workspace. Users with existing connections will skip this flow.
firstRun.privacyDescription: Error reporting is off by default. When enabled, it is used only for crashes and recoverable errors; terminal content, file content, and credentials are never collected.
firstRun.errorReporting: Allow local error reporting and crash markers
firstRun.includeDiagnostics: Attach diagnostic summary by default when reporting issues
firstRun.systemCredentialModeHelp: Default mode. Credentials are protected by the current OS user and usually cannot be decrypted after copying to another machine.
firstRun.masterCredentialModeHelp: Useful for cross-machine backups or a stricter boundary. The credential store must be unlocked after launch.
firstRun.masterPasswordOptional: Leave blank to keep the existing master password.
firstRun.backupHint: To move machines or back up settings, copy only config.json from the production directory. Default credentials are protected by this machine and may need to be re-entered or switched to master password mode after copying.

errors.masterPasswordRequired: A master password is required to enable master password mode.
errors.masterPasswordMismatch: The two master passwords do not match.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save first launch settings.
errors.securityFailed: Failed to update credential security settings.

welcome.title: Welcome to SimpleShell

welcome.description: A lightweight terminal emulator with a simple interface and powerful features.
welcome.emptyDescription: Add an SSH host first. After saving it, you can open a terminal immediately or organize it in Connection Manager.
welcome.emptyHint: The sample address is not saved. Use your own server host, port, username, and authentication method.

validation.hostMissing: Enter a hostname or IP address.
validation.portInvalid: Port must be an integer from 1 to 65535.
validation.passwordAuthOk: Password authentication is selected. If the password is not saved, you will be prompted when connecting.
validation.proxyDisabled: Proxy is disabled; the connection will go directly to the target host.
validation.proxyDefault: Default or system proxy settings will be used.
validation.proxyHostMissing: Custom proxy requires a proxy host.

validation.privateKeyUnreadable: Private key file is not readable.

validation.privateKeyOk: Private key file is readable and permissions look valid.

errorBoundary.appTitle: The application encountered a critical error
errorBoundary.appMessage: SimpleShell encountered an unrecoverable error. You can try restarting the application to resolve this issue.
errorBoundary.supportMessage: If the issue persists, contact technical support and include the error details.
errorBoundary.componentMessage: {{componentName}} encountered an error while loading. Please try reloading.

recoverable.title: Action needed
solutions: Review the current input, path, permission, or connection setting.
Apply the correction and run the operation again.

retry.title: Retry needed
solutions: Check the network, proxy, remote service, or update source status.
Run the operation again after the connection is stable.

feedback.title: Feedback needed
solutions: Copy the diagnostic summary and keep the triggering operation details.
Report the issue with diagnostics if it happens again.

fatal.title: Fatal error
solutions: Reload the window or restart the application to restore the runtime.
Copy the diagnostic summary before reporting if it happens again.

ECONNREFUSED.title: Cannot Connect to Server
ECONNREFUSED.message:
Connection refused by the server. Possible reasons:
• Server is not running or SSH service is not started
• Incorrect port number
• Firewall blocking the connection
solutions: Check if the server is running
Verify SSH service is started (usually port 22)
Check if the port number is correct
Review firewall rules

ETIMEDOUT.title: Connection Timeout
ETIMEDOUT.message:
Unable to connect to server within the specified time. Possible reasons:
• Unstable or slow network connection
• Server taking too long to respond
• Firewall or network device blocking the connection
solutions: Check your network connection
Verify server response time
Try increasing timeout duration
Check for network firewall restrictions

EHOSTUNREACH.title: Host Unreachable
EHOSTUNREACH.message:
Cannot reach the destination host. Possible reasons:
• Incorrect server address
• Network routing issues
• Server is offline
solutions: Verify the server address is correct
Check network connectivity
Test host connectivity using ping command
Contact network administrator for routing issues

ENOTFOUND.title: Cannot Resolve Hostname
ENOTFOUND.message:
Unable to resolve the server's hostname. Possible reasons:
• Typo in hostname
• DNS server cannot resolve the domain
• Network DNS configuration issues
solutions: Check hostname spelling
Try using IP address instead of hostname
Check DNS server configuration
Verify the domain name is valid

ECONNRESET.title: Connection Reset
ECONNRESET.message:
Connection was unexpectedly closed by server or network device. Possible reasons:
• Server unexpectedly disconnected
• Network interruption
• Connection timeout closed by server
solutions: Check server status
Verify network stability
Review server logs for disconnect reason
Try reconnecting

ENETUNREACH.title: Network Unreachable
ENETUNREACH.message:
Cannot access the target network. Possible reasons:
• Local network not connected
• Routing configuration errors
• VPN or proxy not connected
solutions: Check local network connection
Verify router or gateway configuration
If using VPN, ensure it's connected
Check proxy settings

AUTH_FAILED.title: SSH Authentication Failed
AUTH_FAILED.message:
Unable to authenticate. Possible reasons:
• Incorrect username or password
• Invalid or unauthorized SSH key
• Server rejects this authentication method
solutions: Verify username and password are correct
Check if SSH key is valid
Confirm key is added to server's authorized_keys
Verify server allows this authentication method

KEY_ERROR.title: SSH Key Error
KEY_ERROR.message:
Cannot load or use SSH key. Possible reasons:
• Incorrect key file path
• Incorrect key file permissions
• Unsupported key format
• Key passphrase required
solutions: Verify key file path is correct
Check key file permissions (should be 600 or 400)
Verify key format is correct
If key is password protected, confirm correct passphrase

EACCES.title: Permission Denied
EACCES.message:
Insufficient permissions to perform this operation. Possible reasons:
• File or directory permission denied
• User has limited permissions
• File is locked or in use
solutions: Check file or directory permissions
Verify user has sufficient permissions
Contact administrator for proper permissions
Check if file is being used by another program

ENOENT.title: File Not Found
ENOENT.message:
Cannot find the specified file or directory. Possible reasons:
• Incorrect file path
• File has been deleted
• Typo in filename
solutions: Verify file path is correct
Check if file exists
Check filename spelling
Verify you have access to this path

OPERATION_TIMEOUT.title: Operation Timeout
OPERATION_TIMEOUT.message:
Operation did not complete within expected time. Possible reasons:
• Network speed is too slow
• Server response delay
• Large amount of data being processed
solutions: Check network connection speed
Retry the operation later
Consider processing data in batches
Increase timeout duration

UNKNOWN.title: Error Occurred
solutions: Please try again later
If the issue persists, contact administrator
